=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:25-5:61) TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof AddressId.Type'"

[D2] (8:23-8:52) TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof Address.Type'"

[D3] (13:6-13:16) TS6196: 'BusinessId' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

[D4] (13:19-13:63) TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof Models.BusinessId.Type'"

[D5] (15:6-15:19) TS6196: 'GoodTypeQuery' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

[D6] (15:22-15:41) TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `Address`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'Address'"

[D7] (16:6-16:20) TS6196: 'GoodSchemaType' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

[D8] (16:30-16:34) TS2694: Namespace '"/node_modules/effect/dist/Schema"' has no exported member 'Type'.
  (no quick fixes)

[D9] (23:6-23:15) TS6196: 'Unrelated' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof AddressId.Type'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
import { Schema, Schema as S } from "effect"

export const AddressId = Schema.String
export type AddressId = typeof AddressId.Type

export const Address = Schema.Struct({ id: AddressId })
export type Address = S.Schema.Type<typeof Address>

namespace Models {
  export const BusinessId = Schema.String
}
type BusinessId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Models.BusinessId>

type GoodTypeQuery = typeof Address.Type
type GoodSchemaType = Schema.Type<typeof Address>

declare namespace LocalSchema {
  namespace Schema {
    type Type<T> = T
  }
}
type Unrelated = LocalSchema.Schema.Type<typeof Address>


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof Address.Type'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
import { Schema, Schema as S } from "effect"

export const AddressId = Schema.String
export type AddressId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof AddressId>

export const Address = Schema.Struct({ id: AddressId })
export type Address = typeof Address.Type

namespace Models {
  export const BusinessId = Schema.String
}
type BusinessId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Models.BusinessId>

type GoodTypeQuery = typeof Address.Type
type GoodSchemaType = Schema.Type<typeof Address>

declare namespace LocalSchema {
  namespace Schema {
    type Type<T> = T
  }
}
type Unrelated = LocalSchema.Schema.Type<typeof Address>


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof Models.BusinessId.Type'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
import { Schema, Schema as S } from "effect"

export const AddressId = Schema.String
export type AddressId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof AddressId>

export const Address = Schema.Struct({ id: AddressId })
export type Address = S.Schema.Type<typeof Address>

namespace Models {
  export const BusinessId = Schema.String
}
type BusinessId = typeof Models.BusinessId.Type

type GoodTypeQuery = typeof Address.Type
type GoodSchemaType = Schema.Type<typeof Address>

declare namespace LocalSchema {
  namespace Schema {
    type Type<T> = T
  }
}
type Unrelated = LocalSchema.Schema.Type<typeof Address>


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Replace with 'Address'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
import { Schema, Schema as S } from "effect"

export const AddressId = Schema.String
export type AddressId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof AddressId>

export const Address = Schema.Struct({ id: AddressId })
export type Address = S.Schema.Type<typeof Address>

namespace Models {
  export const BusinessId = Schema.String
}
type BusinessId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Models.BusinessId>

type GoodTypeQuery = Address
type GoodSchemaType = Schema.Type<typeof Address>

declare namespace LocalSchema {
  namespace Schema {
    type Type<T> = T
  }
}
type Unrelated = LocalSchema.Schema.Type<typeof Address>
